name: premium-pet-studio-test-mode
description: Verify Studio test-mode grants premium purchases immediately and renders the equipped high-tier pet aura and Robux display stands.

args.code: local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local r=game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest r:FireServer({action='BuyPremiumPet',target='Celestial Guardian'}) task.wait(.6) r:FireServer({action='BuyPremiumFist',target='Celestial Titan Fist'}) local deadline=os.clock()+3 repeat task.wait(.05) until os.clock()>=deadline or (p.RPGStats.OwnedPremiumPetsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true) and p.RPGStats.OwnedPremiumFistsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Titan Fist',1,true)) return p.RPGStats.OwnedPremiumPetsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true) and p.RPGStats.OwnedPremiumFistsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Titan Fist',1,true) and 'PURCHASED' or 'TIMEOUT'

steps.label: buy premium pet and fist in test mode

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local s=p.RPGStats local stands,priceSurfaces=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetDescendants()) do if d:GetAttribute('VisualRole')=='PremiumPetRobuxStand' then stands+=1 end if d:IsA('SurfaceGui') and d.Parent and d.Parent.Name:find('Premium Pet Price') and d.AlwaysOnTop and d.LightInfluence==0 then priceSurfaces+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=s.OwnedPremiumPetsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true)~=nil and s.PetInventoryJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true)~=nil and s.EquippedPetsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true)~=nil and s.PetMultiplier.Value>=15 and s.OwnedPremiumFistsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Titan Fist',1,true)~=nil and s.EquippedFist.Value=='Celestial Titan Fist' and s.FistMultiplier.Value>=60 and stands>=3 and priceSurfaces==6,pet=s.PetMultiplier.Value,fist=s.FistMultiplier.Value,stands=stands,priceSurfaces=priceSurfaces,equipped=s.EquippedFist.Value})

steps.label: premium state readable prices and displays

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local f=workspace:FindFirstChild(p.Name..' Client Companions') local aura,lights,particles=0,0,0 if f then for _,d in ipairs(f:GetDescendants()) do aura=math.max(aura,tonumber(d:GetAttribute('AuraTier')) or 0) if d:IsA('PointLight') then lights+=1 elseif d:IsA('ParticleEmitter') then particles+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=f~=nil and aura>=6 and lights>0 and particles>0,aura=aura,lights=lights,particles=particles})
